subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letters were received and thy cry and lamentation reached unto the highest heaven... Now thou must, in gratitude for these confirmations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه های شما رسید فریاد و حنین شما باوج اعلی میرسید ... حال شما به شکرانه اين تأييدات بايد
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @consultation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @thankfulness; gratitude, @service to others; to the Cause of God
